$comment: Declarative cross-file coherence rules consumed by .claude/scripts/verify-linter.sh check_field_role_map() and check_artifact_lifecycle(). Each rule is a static-analysis assertion across template files. Findings are reported as CROSS_FILE_CONTRADICTION category and folded into observation-phase Step 5b-coherence. See .claude/templates/experiment-yaml.md and .claude/scripts/lib/derive_pages.py for the canonical golden_path semantics.

rules.description: SCOPE consumers (count-based / set-based access) must call derive_scope_pages() rather than reading golden_path directly. FUNNEL consumers (sequence/order-based access) declare a coherence-allow pragma. Count-based regex (len(golden_path), set(golden_path)) is forbidden unconditionally — pragma cannot whitelist these. See #1024.
